class.description: Ackermann steering motion model. Enforces a minimum turning radius constraint. Parameters (under the plugin namespace): min_turning_r (float, default 0.2): minimum turning radius in metres.
Differential drive motion model. Non-holonomic, no additional kinematic constraints beyond the standard velocity and acceleration limits.
Omnidirectional motion model. Holonomic — supports independent vx, vy, and wz control. This is the default model when no plugin is explicitly configured.
